scripts.smoke:all: npm run check:scripts && npm run check:compose && npm run check:payment-retention && npm run check:cache-policy && npm run smoke:prod && npm run smoke:auth-providers && npm run smoke:public-manifests && npm run smoke:security && npm run smoke:routes && npm run smoke:route-audit && npm run smoke:seo && npm run smoke:cache-headers && npm run smoke:copy
scripts.smoke:full: npm run smoke:all && npm run maintenance:precheck
scripts.gate:prod: npm run check:scripts && npm run check:compose && npm run check:recovery && npm run check:payment-retention && npm run check:cache-policy && npm run smoke:auth-providers && npm run smoke:public-manifests && npm run smoke:cache-headers && npm run build && npm run verify:quick
scripts.check:compose: docker compose config >/tmp/mercasto_compose_base.out && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.override.yml config >/tmp/mercasto_compose_override.out
